globalCharacterLock:
GLOBAL CHARACTER LOCK:
Elisa is a 10-year-old Latin American girl with warm light skin, round face, large brown eyes, a few soft freckles, copper-orange wavy shoulder-length hair in a low half-ponytail with a small light-blue hair clip on the right side. She wears a white short-sleeve school polo, navy blue skirt, white socks, black shoes, and a small red backpack.
Maxi is a 10-year-old Latin American boy with light tan skin, round face, large dark-brown eyes, straight dark-brown bowl-cut hair with one small strand over the forehead. He wears a yellow sweatshirt, an open navy blue jacket, beige pants, blue sneakers, and a green backpack. When nervous, he holds one backpack strap with both hands.
Maintain the same character designs, clothing, age, body proportions, colors and facial features across all images.
negativePromptGlobal: Avoid: changing Elisa's or Maxi's character design between slides; making either child look older; changing Elisa's hair color, blue hair clip, uniform or red backpack; changing Maxi's haircut, yellow sweatshirt, navy jacket, beige pants, blue shoes or green backpack; aggressive bullying, physical violence, cruel extreme faces, exaggerated tears, dark scary scenes, visible text, logos, official cover elements, copied art, signatures, watermarks, the original illustrator's style, or the style of living artists.

imageFormat.safeZone: Main characters remain away from the edges.

Create an original warm children's digital illustration in 4:3 aspect ratio.
Scene: Elisa stands in front of the entrance of a primary school painted light green. The school has a visible patio, simple school posters, a few paint buckets, brushes and a small ladder in one corner to suggest the school is being painted. Several children walk in the background. Elisa is in the foreground, wearing her fixed white-and-navy uniform and red backpack. She looks at the entrance with curiosity and slight doubt. Mood: calm, bright, beginning of a story, something different may happen today. No text, no logos, no watermarks.
slides.consistencyNotes: Elisa appears with copper-orange hair, blue clip, white polo, navy skirt and red backpack; school uses the same light-green building palette.
